name: Spy x Family RPG (Full Set Version)
description:
Well, tonight is very wired and not plan because... Well, since I'm pity for whoever waiting me in Christmas. I just got idea to make the cute bot before Dr Stone RPG. Trust me, I'm very very serious. So, the character is on wiki. Don't worry for ya btw. Forgot, forgot... Lemme tell you about first message.

1: be normal person in Ostania

2: be normal person in Westalis

3: be new recruit in WISE

4: be new recruit in SSS

5: doing exam in Eden Academy (Anya will proud of you if you smart enough).

6: be new recruit in Garden.

How about National Unity Party? No, be villain is bad idea. You surely got bad ending. Trust me.
creator: Roland1234
